mapper.select: SELECT homepage_id, homepage_group, homepage_name, homepage_eng_name, homepage_alias, homepage_tell , homepage_fax, homepage_send_tell, zipcode, address1, address2, eng_address, homepage_type, homepage_code , domain, context_path, folder, remark, temp_use_yn, blog_url, facebook_url, twitter_url, kakao_url , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(temp_start_date,'yyyyMMddHHmi'), 'MM.dd hh:mi') AS temp_start_date , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(temp_end_date,'yyyyMMddHHmi'), 'MM.dd hh:mi') AS temp_end_date, print_seq, support_manager_phone,support_teacher_phone , support_facility_phone, board_type, kiosk_type, smartbook_type, mediawall_type FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE WHERE homepage_id NOT IN ('c0', 'c1', 'h27', 'h33', 'h34', 'h35') ORDER BY print_seq, homepage_type, homepage_name

SELECT homepage_id, homepage_group, homepage_name, homepage_eng_name, homepage_alias, homepage_tell , homepage_fax, homepage_send_tell, zipcode, address1, address2, eng_address, homepage_type, homepage_code , domain, context_path, folder, remark, temp_use_yn, blog_url, facebook_url, twitter_url, kakao_url , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(temp_start_date,'yyyyMMddHHmi'), 'MM.dd hh:mi') AS temp_start_date , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(temp_end_date,'yyyyMMddHHmi'), 'MM.dd hh:mi') AS temp_end_date, print_seq, support_manager_phone,support_teacher_phone , support_facility_phone, board_type, kiosk_type, smartbook_type, mediawall_type FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE WHERE homepage_type != '0' ORDER BY print_seq, homepage_type, homepage_name

${pagingTop} SELECT homepage_id, homepage_group, homepage_name, homepage_eng_name, homepage_alias, homepage_tell , homepage_fax, homepage_send_tell, zipcode, address1, address2, eng_address, blog_url, facebook_url, twitter_url, kakao_url, homepage_type, homepage_code , domain, context_path, folder, remark, temp_use_yn , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(temp_start_date,'yyyyMMddHHmi'), 'MM.dd hh:mi') AS temp_start_date , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(temp_end_date,'yyyyMMddHHmi'), 'MM.dd hh:mi') AS temp_end_date, print_seq, support_manager_phone,support_teacher_phone , support_facility_phone, board_type, kiosk_type, smartbook_type, mediawall_type FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE ORDER BY print_seq, homepage_type, homepage_name ${pagingBottom}

SELECT a.homepage_id , a.homepage_group , a.homepage_name , a.homepage_eng_name , a.homepage_alias , a.homepage_tell , a.homepage_fax , a.homepage_send_tell , a.zipcode , a.address1 , a.address2 , a.eng_address , a.blog_url , a.facebook_url , a.twitter_url , a.kakao_url , a.homepage_type , a.homepage_code , a.domain , a.context_path , a.folder , a.remark , a.temp_use_yn , a.temp_start_date , a.temp_end_date , a.mystorage_limit_count , a.print_seq , a.support_manager_phone , a.support_teacher_phone , a.support_facility_phone , a.board_type , a.kiosk_type , a.smartbook_type , a.mediawall_type , a.homepage_send_tell FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE a WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}

SELECT homepage_id, homepage_group, homepage_name, homepage_eng_name, homepage_alias, homepage_tell ,homepage_fax, homepage_send_tell, zipcode, address1, address2, eng_address, blog_url, facebook_url, twitter_url, kakao_url, homepage_type, homepage_code ,domain, context_path, folder, remark, temp_use_yn, temp_start_date, temp_end_date, mystorage_limit_count, print_seq, support_manager_phone,support_teacher_phone , support_facility_phone, board_type, kiosk_type, smartbook_type, mediawall_type FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE WHERE
context_path = #{context_path}
context_path is null
AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_HOMEPAGE SET homepage_group = #{homepage_group}, homepage_name = #{homepage_name}, homepage_eng_name = #{homepage_eng_name}, homepage_alias = #{homepage_alias}, homepage_tell = #{homepage_tell}, homepage_fax = #{homepage_fax}, homepage_send_tell = #{homepage_send_tell}, zipcode = #{zipcode}, address1 = #{address1}, address2 = #{address2}, eng_address = #{eng_address}, blog_url = #{blog_url}, facebook_url = #{facebook_url}, twitter_url = #{twitter_url}, kakao_url = #{kakao_url}, homepage_type = #{homepage_type}, homepage_code = #{homepage_code}, domain = #{domain}, context_path = #{context_path}, folder = #{folder}, remark = #{remark}, mystorage_limit_count = #{mystorage_limit_count}, print_seq = #{print_seq}, support_manager_phone = #{support_manager_phone}, support_teacher_phone = #{support_teacher_phone}, support_facility_phone = #{support_facility_phone}, board_type = #{board_type}, kiosk_type = #{kiosk_type}, smartbook_type = #{smartbook_type}, mediawall_type = #{mediawall_type} WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
UPDATE CMS_HOMEPAGE SET temp_use_yn = #{temp_use_yn}, temp_start_date = #{temp_start_date}, temp_end_date = #{temp_end_date} WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE WHERE
homepage_id = 'h28'
homepage_id = 'h13'
homepage_id = 'h13'
homepage_code = #{homepage_code}

SELECT * FROM CMS_HOMEPAGE A, WB_MEMBER_GROUP B, WB_MEMBER_GROUP_SUBORD C WHERE a.homepage_id = B.site_id AND B.member_group_idx = C.member_group_idx AND C.member_id = #{member_id}
ORDER BY homepage_name
